SE Paper Trimmer 12 Inch Cutting Board Magnetic with Grid Guide Base

Ensure you get straight cuts during your crafting or DIY projects with the Universal Tool 12 Inch Paper Trimmer!

This trimmer is compact, lightweight and easy to transport. It can cut up to 4 sheets of paper at once, and features a magnetic cutting bar to hold the paper in place while you cut. Rubber stoppers are located on the base to prevent slippage, and it has a 6 x 21 square grid guide for use while cutting.

Key Features

  • Compact, Lightweight & Easy to Transport
  • Cuts Up to 4 Sheets At Once
  • Magnetic Cutting Bar To Hold Paper in Place
  • Rubber Stoppers On Base to Prevent Slippage

Product Specifications

  • MPN: PC1212
  • UPC: 060886988649
  • Color: Blue
  • Size: Large

FEATURES:

- Dimensions: 14” x 3-½” - Cuts paper up to 12” in length - Cuts up to 4 sheets of paper at once - Ruler units: inches and centimeters - 6 x 21 square grid guide on base - Rubberized grip on blade cartridge - Magnetic cutting bar to hold paper in place - Blade cartridge has four markers for accurate cuts - x4 rubber stoppers on base to prevent sliding

PACKAGE INCLUDES:

(1) Universal Tool Paper Trimmer 12"
